programme.title: Live Miami F1 GP: Qualifying
programme.desc: The grid for Sunday's Miami Grand Prix is set with Formula 1 qualifying, as the drivers look to battle their way through to the Q3 top-10 shootout for a chance at pole position.

programme.title: Live Ted's Quali Notebook: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Kravitz is live as he gathers reaction from inside the paddock and reviews all the biggest stories from qualifying at the Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Goals On Sunday
programme.desc: A round-up of all the latest goals and major talking points from around the world of football.

programme.title: Sunday Supplement
programme.desc: The UK's top sports journalists dissect the stories in the Sunday newspapers, offering insight, opinion and in-depth analysis. Essential viewing for fans who want more than just the score.

programme.title: Live SPFL: Hibernian v Celtic
programme.desc: Hibernian entertain Celtic in a clash from the Scottish Premiership.

programme.title: Live PL: Man Utd v Liverpool
programme.desc: A fierce rivalry renewed with Champions League qualification the aim for both, Manchester United and Liverpool lock horns again on a huge Super Sunday at Old Trafford.

programme.title: Live Grand Prix Sunday: Miami
programme.desc: Join Sky Sports F1 on the grid ahead of the start of the race at the Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Live Miami F1 Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's lights out for the 2026 Miami Grand Prix. Last season, Oscar Piastri led a McLaren one-two as Mercedes' George Russell came home in third.

programme.title: Live Chequered Flag: Miami
programme.desc: As the chequered flag comes down on the Miami Grand Prix, join Sky Sports F1 for all the reaction and analysis.

programme.title: Live: College Softball
programme.desc: Action from women's college softball.

programme.title: 7Innings Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date college softball highlights, scores, and analysis live from experts in the studio.

programme.title: ESPN Films
programme.desc: Series of documentaries looking back through the history of sports.

programme.title: Live: The Point
programme.desc: Featuring highlights, news, analysis, speed, skill and access to the stars, stories and personalities of the game; hosted by John Buccigross.

programme.desc: The latest hockey action from across the NHL.

programme.title: ESPN Films
programme.desc: Series of documentaries looking back through the history of sports.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: At the 1983 College World Series, the championship culminated in a matchup between Roger Clemens' Texas Longhorns and the upstart Alabama Crimson Tide; a team of overachievers that included the best hitter in college baseball, Dave Magadan.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Burger Burger in Biloxi, Miss.; for po-boy loaves, layered with double patties and onion sauce; Troy's Snack Shack in Montezuma, Ga., for sloppy chili-slaw burgers; Hamburger King near downtown Montgomery, Ala.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: The fascinating backstory behind the famous/infamous 1988 "Catholics vs. Convicts" college football game between Notre Dame and the University of Miami. The slogan summarized the subtext of cultural and racial tensions brewing between the schools.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Pittsburgh Pirates face Cincinnati Reds in a regular-season baseball matchup at PNC Park. This is the first game of a three game series. Pittsburgh holds a 2-1 advantage in the matchup following a dominant 8-3 victory during a prior meeting.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia is a growing force in world football, Erling Haaland fired Norway to the World Cup for the first time this century, and Panama will be one of the toughest teams at the finals.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Belgium hopes their golden generation can make one final push for glory, Martin Odegaard is Norway's natural-born leader, and we check out host city Miami.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Minnesota Twins face Toronto Blue Jays in a regular-season baseball matchup at Target Field. This is the final contest of a four-game set. Minnesota won the April series 2-1 following an 8-2 victory in their last meeting in a game of three series.

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Live: Toronto Raptors Pre-Game
programme.desc: Coverage and analysis of Raptors basketball.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Eastern Conference First Round, Game 7. (If necessary).

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Terry invites good friends Keith Heinlein and Skip Knowles to join him duck hunting at Wide Open Outfitters in Mexico.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Hunting the elusive red brocket takes Jim deep into the jungles of Mexico.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Jim Shockey heads to Mexico for a rare chance to go after desert bighorn sheep with his Nosler rifle.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve heads to the Sonoran Desert to stalk free-ranging buffalo on some truly spectacular terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve, Mark Kenyon and Ryan Callaghan hunt for coues deer in the mountains of Sonora.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: The hunt for coues deer continues, and the ranch chef prepares chili Colorado tamales with venison.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Everything is a-ok in Oklahoma for a pair of bustling bow hunters.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Searching for world record bucks.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Maine lobster, the bedrock industry for many residents, is a sustainable fishery that's been responsibly managed by the fishermen, but faces new and growing threats from many fronts; Tommy also tests the limits of his ability to eat lobster rolls.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Mike and Heather beach seine to catch salmon, which they then prepare in a variety of ways to distribute among their community and family.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath heads to Alabama for swamp bunnies and racoons, but it's as much about the dogs as it is the game they're after; after the hunts, Leysath finds out if they're fit to eat.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Searching for world record bucks.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Continuing on his Guyana voyage, Steve -- with guides Rovin and Dennis -- goes deep for redtail catfish, then learns to craft arrows with curassow feathers.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In the fourth and final leg of his Guyana journey, Steve and his party portage their boats around rapids to bow-fish for pacu, a herbivorous piranha.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Let's Talk Turkey.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Camp visits by grizzlies, air plane rescues, and an unlucky cameraman.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer in the state's Upper Peninsula looks into too much bait and ORV use where it's prohibited while a Lower Peninsula officer checks on a kayaker on the archery deer opener.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The unicorn of WWII German firearms.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Walleye Fishing at Grassy Narrows Lodge on Lake of the Woods in Canada with a group of Veterans and Mandatory Fun Outdoors.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: There's magic in the mayhem, as the In-Fisherman staff fishes for those feisty little overlooked dudes, the yellow bass; goes all in SlobberKnocker knockin' largemouths; and trolls up some reservoir muskies with lures that really rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: John Bergsma showcases fishing hot spots in the Great Lakes region.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Headed out to Pulley Ridge this episode, the crew is hoping to get on some deep drop fishing action.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Ninkia Green is a restaurant owner whose influence extends far beyond her delicious cuisine. She shares her inspiring journey of growth, passion, and purpose as a dedicated community leader making a lasting impact.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Bass Pro Shops founder Johnny Morris joins Bill for a fantastic trip along Florida's Space Coast!

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Maine lobster, the bedrock industry for many residents, is a sustainable fishery that's been responsibly managed by the fishermen, but faces new and growing threats from many fronts; Tommy also tests the limits of his ability to eat lobster rolls.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike and Captain Vincent Sabatella catch some big Grouper in the shallow waters of Citrus County.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: This week's episode features Let's Fish anchor Andrew Upshaw fishing for stripers on Lake Hartwell.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: There's magic in the mayhem, as the In-Fisherman staff fishes for those feisty little overlooked dudes, the yellow bass; goes all in SlobberKnocker knockin' largemouths; and trolls up some reservoir muskies with lures that really rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching plat

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and fishery biologist Jeryl Jones catch a ton of 3-8 lb. bass on frogs, spinnerbaits, and worms, while Jeryl explains how he built his super lake.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Lake Ontario Salmon Trolling.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Let's Talk Turkey.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Shock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is re-lived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Searching for world record bucks.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath heads to Alabama for swamp bunnies and racoons, but it's as much about the dogs as it is the game they're after; after the hunts, Leysath finds out if they're fit to eat.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Capt. Don and his grandson Tyler, as they target giant sturgeon on the Fraser River with Langs Fishing adventures out of Mission, BC.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Walleye Fishing at Grassy Narrows Lodge on Lake of the Woods in Canada with a group of Veterans and Mandatory Fun Outdoors.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: We move from the public marsh setting for teal and move to privately managed rotational rice habitat for a shoot down south.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Everything is a-ok in Oklahoma for a pair of bustling bow hunters.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Tim Sylvia Meets up with Dave Hendrickson and they are hunting pigs with the Pork Police.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger takes his daughter-in-law on her first hunt celebrating the birth of his 17th grandchild.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The crew closes out Canada goose season with Tornado Alley Waterfowl in Kansas; a frigid front pushes in birds; banded honkers; a snowstorm shootout; Joe Palumbo's first-ever Quill goose.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: The crew met Juan years ago, and now he invites them to hunt some of his ground in Illinois; let's just say it was worth the drive from Mississippi.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan recounts hunts from Missouri.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Angels host the New York Mets to open a three-game weekend interleague series at Angel Stadium. Entering the series, both teams have struggled early in the season, with the Angels looking to bounce back from a difficult stretch.

programme.title: The Wright Way
programme.desc: To honor one of the most beloved players in Mets history, SNY presents a special original documentary celebrating the legacy of David Wright. From his earliest days in Queens to his rise as team captain and fan favorite.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Angel Stadium of Anaheim in Anaheim, Calif.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Mets Fast Forward
programme.desc: From May 2, 2026.

programme.title: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Mets Fast Forward
programme.desc: From May 2, 2026.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Angel Stadium of Anaheim in Anaheim, Calif.

programme.title: Amazin' Finishes
programme.desc: A year-by-year look at the team's most exciting comebacks, big hits, clutch performances and walk-off homers - all on full display for Mets fans to relive.

programme.title: Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Angels host the New York Mets at Angel Stadium in a regular-season showdown. This marks the second contest of a three-game series. The interleague matchup features a clash between the American League West and the National League East.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1973.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Oh Yeah... is a gold mine of obscure, oddball, and twisted stories spanning 40 years in New York Sports and nothing is off limits. With interviews involving celebrity and sports personalities, SNY takes a look back.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Bottom-fishing out of Ocean Isle Beach, NC with Salt Fever Guide Service is always an exhausting workout.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Headed out to Pulley Ridge this episode, the crew is hoping to get on some deep drop fishing action.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob heads down to Key West for some epic offshore bottom fishing with his long time friend RT.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Jared is participating in the Islamorada Fishing Tournament held at the Cheeca Lodge down in The Florida Keys. The tournament is put on by the Widom brothers to benefit Crohn's Disease and Celiac research. Jared hits the water.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Three Teams compete in Oxford, AL for Knockout Match 1 of the Patriot Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Ott DeFoe uses every tool in his arsenal to pick apart this Georgian lake in search of big bass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in late January.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Once a season isn't enough for Z as he sticks around for another day of big buffalo smallmouth.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Zanzibar, the majestic spice island of the Indian Ocean. A veritable melting pot of cultures and a rich, varied history make for a fascinating adventure through ancient Africa, a perfect foil for what was to come...

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: Trophy fish remain the pursuit of every angler when making the journey to fish a piece of water. Tommo and Rhu cruise around the Chobe game reserve and surrounds, looking for the double-digit Tigers.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: Alphonse Island is a nature haven in the Indian Ocean. Its waters are home to many aquatic species and the island is the base of the Alphonse fishing company.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The spectacular outer Atolls of the Seychelles Archipelago need to be seen to be believed & when it comes to fishing, this is truly Nirvana. We go in search of a plethora of species to catch & release using a multitude of lures and angling methods.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Join the talented guides of the Alphonse Fishing Company as they take a rare break to explore their stunning fishery.

programme.title: Live: Eredivisie Soccer
programme.desc: From De Goffert Stadium in Nijmegen, Gelderland, Netherlands.

programme.title: Rugby Super League
programme.desc: From Stade Gilbert Brutus in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, France.

programme.desc: From Feb. 16, 2008.

programme.title: FA Cup Classics
programme.desc: From March 8, 2008.

programme.desc: Comprehensive coverage of all the action from the matches played as part of the Rugby Super League.
